title: Ubiquiti UACC-CM-RJ45-MG, 10G Copper Module, SFP+
category: Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP+
description: UACC-CM-RJ45-MG is a universal 10-Gigabit SFP+ metal module from Ubiquiti with RJ45 connector for metal cable with data rate option 1G / 2.5G / 5G and 10 Gbps . The range of the module is up to 100 meters when using a Cat.6A cable, even at a speed of 10 Gbps. Max. module consumption is 1.9W
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP+ For cable type Metallic Transmission speed 1 Gbps, 2.5 Gbps, 5 Gbps, 10 Gbps Distance [km] 0,1 Transfer type Metallic Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors RJ45 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70
